lastScan.notes: Cron fired but discovery complete. Awaiting Alan's decision. CRON SHOULD BE DISABLED - gateway timeout prevented disabling.

keyLearnings: No blue oceans - every obvious opportunity has players
Best sellers on Gumroad are SUBSCRIPTIONS, not one-time products
AI + [profession] tools are being rapidly built - window closing
Free competitors make monetization hard
Chrome extensions have good distribution but competitive
Success requires: (a) extremely specific niche, (b) better execution, or (c) unique distribution
Boring problems = less competition
Lead scraping is proven but has platform/legal risk
Image generation APIs are crowded (Bannerbear, Creatomate, etc.)
AI prompt packs EXTREMELY saturated (240K+ on PromptBase)
Audio products underserved - creators need royalty-free music/SFX
HIPAA compliance creates natural barrier for healthcare templates
Micro-ebooks work when hyper-specific (audience + problem combo)
Notion templates saturated but extreme niches can work
Vertical booking systems are well-served (pet grooming: MoeGo, tattoo: Porter/Venue)
SMB-focused alternatives to enterprise tools is a pattern - cheaper simpler versions
PLG (product-led growth) potential is a strong scalability indicator
Mini-courses at $47 beat comprehensive $997 courses - simplicity sells
Gamified planners more saturated than Reddit claims - Habitica dominates
Co-parenting planners have established SaaS players (Custody X Change, OurFamilyWizard)
Fantasy map brushes crowded despite niche appeal
QuickBooks training gap exists - Intuit's training is generic, Udemy is overwhelming
Dunning/payment recovery CROWDED (Churn Buster, ChurnKey, Gravy, etc.)
Field service management RED OCEAN (ServiceTitan, Jobber, Housecall Pro)
Legal client portals served by practice mgmt tools (Clio, PracticePanther)
CPA document collection crowded (TaxDome, Canopy, SmartVault)
Local reputation management super competitive (Podium, GatherUp, NiceJob)
Contractor bid estimating well-served (TurboBid, McCormick, ServiceTitan)
AI Visibility tracking NOW RED OCEAN - BrandLight ($5.75M), Gumshoe AI ($2M), Athena, Ahrefs Brand Radar, Otterly.AI, SE Visible all launched 2025
Crypto tax tracking is RED OCEAN - CoinTracking, Koinly, CoinLedger dominate with auto-imports
Real estate agent templates saturated on Etsy - commodity products
Podcast audio packs crowded - AudioJungle, Storyblocks, Uppbeat subscription model wins
Agency onboarding templates are commodity - multiple Gumroad/Etsy sellers
Bookkeeping onboarding owned by SaaS - TaxDome, Content Snare, Karbon
Construction time tracking SUPER CROWDED - Workyard, ClockShark, WorkMax, BusyBusy
Community hall booking well-served - Hallmaster, Bookteq, MyHallWizard
Marina management has players - Dockwa, Molo, MarinaOffice
Equipment rental covered - Quipli, EZRentOut, Booqable, Renterra
AI infrastructure tools for SMBs is the emerging gap - enterprise covered, indie devs underserved
Personalized childrens books RED OCEAN - Wonderbly, Hooray Heroes (3M+ since 2013) dominate
Toast POS and ServiceTitan offer FREE SOP templates - kills paid template margins
Canva/Jotform/123FormBuilder offer FREE professional templates for most industries
Cash flow tracking for solopreneurs has clear pain point - manual entry overload
Client onboarding kits work when NICHE-SPECIFIC (bookkeepers, consultants vs generic)
Voice-first CRM for field techs CROWDED - FieldCamp, Jobber, GRAZHOPAR all have voice features
Machine shop quoting well-served - Paperless Parts, DigiFabster, Phasio, Catalystk
AI trade training has TradeMath (math focus) + Google partnerships with unions
HOA compliance software well-served - HOALife, Smartwebs, Solink AI
YC RFS boring industries sound fresh but often have players - verify before building
Local regulation monitoring fragmented but buildable - no AI SMS alert service for SMBs
Voice AI for dental CROWDED - Alta AI, Denti.AI, dentalrobot, VideaAI all in market
COI tracking templates FREE from Billy Insurance, BCS - SaaS myCOI handles automation
Catering operations templates FREE from Smartsheet, Template.net, Tripleseat
TikTok Shop: $17.5B projected US sales, 600% YoY growth Q1 2024 - new sellers need entry-level guides
AI prompt courses are generic ($299-1,500) - vertical-specific (marketing, legal) less saturated
AI agent orchestration market exploding: $5.8B to $48.7B by 2034 (23.7% CAGR)
Vibe code security scanning SATURATED - VibeSecurity, VibeAppScanner, SafeVibe.codes, Vibeship (4+ tools in <6 months)
AI agent observability killed by free tiers - Langfuse 50k free, LangSmith free prototyping
B2B webinar repurposing crowded - Goldcast Content Lab, Restream AI, Flowjin all do LinkedIn clips
Industrial quoting for metal shops well-served - Paperless Parts (well-funded), DigiFabster, KipwareQTE
Ghost kitchen inventory has CloudKitchens (built-in), MarketMan, Supy, Oracle - AI forecasting standard
Fleet telematics RED OCEAN - Samsara, Verizon Connect, FleetUp all bundle predictive maintenance
Landscaping satellite estimates done - SatQuote, SiteRecon, Deep Lawn, GoILawn, MapMeasure Pro
HVAC refrigerant compliance served - RefriTrak, Fexa Trakref, ERA Environmental, R-Log app
Self storage for small operators covered - SiteLink dominates, Easy Storage, Storeganise, Cubby fill gap
Deepfake voice detection enterprise-dominated - Resemble AI, Hiya (Chrome extension!), OmniSpeech
Ideas in articles are 6+ months stale - markets move faster than content cycles
TikTok Shop guides SATURATED - multiple Etsy/Gumroad products and Udemy courses
QuickBooks freelancer courses FLOODED on Udemy
AI agent automation courses EVERYWHERE - Udemy, Coursera, Make Academy
Vibe coding courses SATURATED - Codecademy, Udemy, Microsoft, Coursera, Replit
MCP server tutorials FREE from Microsoft, Anthropic, Udemy, Codecademy
Spec-driven dev with Claude Code - GitHub Spec Kit is free/open source
Airbnb expense templates FREE everywhere - Shoeboxed, bnbduck, Templacity
Contractor templates FREE from QuickBooks, Xero, Smartsheet, Vertex42
Real estate lead trackers FREE from multiple sources
Reddit pain point: losing AI context across sessions in long-term projects - potential gap
MCP ecosystem has 8000+ servers across free directories - commoditized
AI agent memory persistence covered by Mem0 (academic + commercial), AWS AgentCore, Recallio
White label chatbot market SUPER SATURATED - BotPenguin, Stammer, SiteGPT, Robofy, CustomGPT all compete
Vibe coding tools for non-devs - Lovable, Bolt, Cursor, Replit, Emergent all established
Indie hacker MRR tracking covered by Baremetrics, ChartMogul, Trust My MRR (open source)
Crypto freelancer invoicing served by Request Finance, Invoice Ninja, Acctual, Ruul
AI dev tooling space moving too fast - opportunities from 2-3 weeks ago now have multiple competitors
Cost segregation DIY guides - REJECTED - compliance-adjacent, complex IRS rules, existing services
Rental property tracking templates - well-served by Stessa (FREE), Baselane, RentalHero
Claude Code/dev workflow templates - ALL FREE on GitHub (awesome-claude-code, cc-sdd, etc.)
QuickBooks landlord COA templates - already commodity on Etsy
SaaS boilerplates (Next.js, Django) - saturated market, nextjstemplates.com dominates
Career-specific planners - competitive but not impossible, need hyper-specific niche
Digital product market extremely mature - incumbents (Intuit, Canva, Smartsheet) offer FREE alternatives
Need COMBINATION PLAYS leveraging Alan's unique background (real estate + CPA + dev + crypto)
AI Prompt Library/Management NOW RED OCEAN - 10+ competitors: Arize AX, PromptLayer, Langfuse, LangSmith, Braintrust, Humanloop, Maxim AI, Helicone, Portkey, PromptHub (Feb 5 validation)
Feedback-to-Roadmap NOW RED OCEAN - Nolt ($29/mo), Featurebase, Quickhunt, ProductLogz, Frill, Upvoty all compete at affordable prices (Feb 5 validation)
Real estate investor accounting well-served - Stessa (FREE by Roofstock), REI Hub, Azibo, Landlord Studio (Feb 5 validation)
1031 Exchange software dominated by Accruit (Exchange Manager Pro) for QIs - consumer side limited to basic calculators (Feb 5 validation)
Deal analyzers dominated by DealCheck, PropStream, Mashvisor, CashOn (Feb 5 validation)
Property management utility automation covered by Buildium, Zego, Baselane (Feb 5 validation)
Apify store has 10,000+ actors including real estate scrapers - marketplace well-served (Feb 5 validation)
Apify $1M Challenge ENDED Jan 31, 2026 - but actors still monetizable on store with pay-per-use model (Feb 5)
Chrome extension ChatGPT Writer = $15k MRR with 700k users - productivity extensions CAN work (Feb 5)
Notion Boost (open source extension) made $10k - augmenting existing popular tools is a pattern (Feb 5)
Shopify apps 85-90% fail, median revenue $725/mo - need underserved niche or 10x better (Feb 5)
MCP servers emerging monetization: 21st.dev playbook = useful tool + API key + $20/mo for limits (Feb 5)
WordPress 34K+ plugins (59%) abandoned >2 years - resurrection opportunity but security risk (Feb 5)
Discord bots work for niche communities - Brazilian market example shows language/region gaps (Feb 5)
MCP ecosystem now 36k+ servers (Dec 2025), Finance only 4.1% of total - vertical specialization possible (Feb 5 11:50am)
QuickBooks MCP exists (Intuit official + CData + Composio) but GENERIC - no vertical features (Feb 5 11:50am)
Real estate MCP servers focus on LISTINGS (for agents), not investor ACCOUNTING - gap exists (Feb 5 11:50am)
Chrome extension success pattern: augment SPECIFIC popular tool (Closet Tools for Poshmark $42k/mo, GMass for Gmail $130k/mo) - not generic AI (Feb 5 11:50am)
MCP growth cooling but viable: 2k/mo new servers in Nov 2025 vs 5k/mo peak in June (Feb 5 11:50am)
Dedalus Labs MCP marketplace: 80% payout to tool authors - emerging revenue channel (Feb 5 11:50am)
RE investors pain with QB: multi-LLC expensive, class tracking clunky, no tutorials for RE setup (Feb 5 11:50am)

QuickBooks for RE Investors mini-course: landlordaccounting.com ABANDONED (free PDF), quickbooksforlandlords.net charges $500 (expensive), Udemy generic/long - GAP for focused 90-min $47-97 course (Feb 5 12:55pm)
Bookkeeper onboarding templates COMMODITY on Etsy - multiple sellers at low prices (Feb 5 12:55pm)
Crypto tax space RED OCEAN - Koinly, CoinLedger, CoinTracker, TurboTax all dominate (Feb 5 12:55pm)
RE analysis spreadsheets FREE everywhere - Stessa, Landlord Studio, Baselane all offer them (Feb 5 12:55pm)
RE Investor QB MCP scored 25/30 - validated pain from REI Hub, Stessa, Baselane, Hemlane. Generic QB MCPs exist but no RE vertical. Combination play ready. (Feb 5 2pm)
nextActions: DECIDE: Both QBO Mini-Course (26) and RE Investor QB MCP (25) are validated - which to build first?
Consider building BOTH as a product ecosystem (course teaches QB, MCP automates it)
If MCP: spec out core features (class setup, Schedule E mapping, property tagging)
If course: outline 90-min curriculum, define $47 vs $97 tier split
DISABLE THIS CRON - discovery phase complete, gateway timeout prevented auto-disable

digital_products.name: QuickBooks Online for RE Investors Mini-Course
digital_products.notes: HIGHEST SCORE. Gap validated: focused 90-min course, QBO-specific, $47-97. PERFECT fit for Alan's background.

software_subscriptions.name: RE Investor QuickBooks MCP
software_subscriptions.notes: Score 25/30. Pain validated by 4+ sources. Generic QB MCP exists but no RE vertical. 21st.dev monetization model.

software_subscriptions.name: AI API Cost Tracker for SMB

product_ecosystem.name: RE Investor QuickBooks Suite
product_ecosystem.thesis: Course teaches investors how to set up QB for rentals. MCP automates the ongoing work. Cross-sell opportunity. Leverages Alan's exact background.
